name: Duo Duplicate Usernames
description: Detects active Duo identities sharing the same username/login.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.username)) AS username, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM duo_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.username), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.username)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Normalize account identifiers to unique usernames and remove duplicate access identities.
